emails.subject: Test deals for your review
emails.body: Test deals for your review The tagg team has made some changes to the bridge. Please review the following deals in tagg stage and let me know if they meet to your approval. US Gas Daily Swaps BOM gas daily MichCon GD/D QV0353 May 01 gas daily HeHub GD/D QV0345 Jun 01 gas daily HeHub GD/D QV0352 Canadian Gas Daily Swap May 01 gas daily EOL Aeco Daily QV0344 Nymex Swap Oct 01 price swap- Nymex QV0355 Please let me know at your earliest convenience if everything looks alright. Dawn 3-9353

emails.subject: Re: Test deals for your review
emails.body: Re: Test deals for your review Dawne, I looked at the Gas Daily swaps and they look good. QV0345 booked as a June deal instead of May 01. The NYMEX swap booked with NXB2 as the expiration. If I'm not mistaken, the swaps should be NX1. Thanks, Errol From: Dawn C Kenne/ENRON@enronXgate on 04/23/2001 05:45 PM
